channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uneven surface, 23rd April
item.description:
Middle lane appeared to have a large piece of concrete sticking up - I hit it with my front passenger wheel and then got a flat tyre It was before turning off southbound on the M5 just before junction 10
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Elmbridge Court Roundabout, 23rd April
item.description:
On the Longlevens side of the roundabout, there are potholes (ok let's call them what they are craters) on the roundabout. They are so huge you have no choice but to go over them and it is extremely dangerous if on a two wheeled vehicle. It seems to be taking an or inordinate amount of time to get resolved bearing in mind the number of pin drops on fix my street over many days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn out road, 23rd April
item.description:
Lots of people have reported way back in March 2026 and here we are past middle of April with barely 1 or 2 pieces of paint around an odd pot hole. If the council person assessing the road thinks filling in on or two potholes resolve the problems in that area of a major artery of the city then they need to go back and be retrained. The road section from traffic lights of both side of roads is worn out and needs fixing properly and once for all
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Hucclecote Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolleys on track, 23rd April
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolleys and baskets on track
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Coppice Gate, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover loose on Redmarley Road, near pedestrian crossing, 23rd April
item.description:
Redmarley Road, towards Priors Road by Sainsbury's
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redmarley Road, Oakley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge deep pothole, 23rd April
item.description:
Huge deep pothole in middle of the lane on the way to Cowley Manor. Daily reports of the hotel guests hitting the pothole on the unlit road and having to get emergency assistance like AA to replace tyre and wheel damage to cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Causing damage to cars even after closing the road to 'fix', 23rd April
item.description:
The whole road completely covered in potholes, even after closing the road to apparently 'fix' absolute joke! Cars have resorted to driving on the wrong side of the road along the whole stretch between the traffic lights to pilgrove way. Disgraceful to be left so long like this!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 23rd April
item.description:
Outside the front of Robinia Close on maple drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Robinia Close, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School warning sign not lined up with road. Needs to be twisted round post to be more visible, 23rd April
item.description:
Street sign post outside the Hewlett Arms pub car park entrance/ Orchard House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Harp Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Pothole on throughabout, 23rd April
item.description:
Pothole on the A40 throughabout on the Elmbridge Court Roadabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Epicormic growth obstructing pavement and junction visibility, 23rd April
item.description:
Outside no32 and repeated further down the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Sydenham Road North, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Lower branches of small birch tree blocking view at junction, 23rd April
item.description:
Opposite No 2 Clarence Square, Cheltenham, and in front of Camden House.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previous repair failing, 23rd April
item.description:
Previous pothole repair is sinking.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdown Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
CW pothole 1100mm x 100mm x 49mm Stop and go TM Outside Church Cottage (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 23rd April
item.description:
Overgrown trees that need cutting back and all the neighboring properties want them cut as well as they are really tall, blocking light from garden and causing issues in general. Could they be pruned or trimmed back
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 23rd April
item.description:
Noisy cover please lift and clean Stop and go TM Opposite the Wheelhouse (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles problem, 23rd April
item.description:
Customer reports that the temporary TS at the location are all stuck on red.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles
